title: Schoolgirl rugby trials
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby trials...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby trials are taking place in the Garden Route area during May, starting tomorrow, 1 May.","html":"GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Schoolgirl rugby trials are taking place in the Garden Route area during May, starting tomorrow, 1 May."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dates, schools:","html":"Dates, schools:"},{"type":"list","items":["1 May - (Mossel Bay, Great Brak, Riversdale, Albertinia, Heidelberg schools) in Albertinia","4 May - (Knysna Titans, Knysna community) in Knysna","9 May - (George, Herold schools) in George","11 May - (Ladysmith, Calitzdorp, Oudtshoorn schools) in Oudtshoorn","18 May - trials to choose SWD team in George."],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For more information, contact SWD coaches, Sihle Luyenge (076 776 2926) and Stanley Kama (081 090 6923).","html":"For more information, contact SWD coaches, Sihle Luyenge (076 776 2926) and Stanley Kama (081 090 6923)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The trials start in Albertinia tomorrow at 09:00.","html":"The trials start in Albertinia tomorrow at 09:00."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
